description: AIception is a software company that builds and integrates AI, machine learning, and computer vision solutions for businesses. Its public website describes services and case studies such as OCR, predictive maintenance, satellite imagery analysis, and image-processing AI-as-a-service.
summary: aiception.com exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the AIception Interactive REST API at `https://aiception.com/api/v2.1`, described by a Swagger/OpenAPI spec and authenticated with HTTP Basic auth.
